expectations.text: Hero contains a business-specific animated visual (van, dog, grooming items)
expectations.evidence: Van SVG with floating ✂️🛁🪮🧴🐾 emoji items using @keyframes float animation; sparkle and steam animations also present

expectations.text: Page uses dark background (#0d0d0d or similar dark color)
Uses a non-default accent color appropriate for pet/health industry
expectations.evidence: #10b981 green accent used throughout (buttons, stat numbers, borders, logo)

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'Groomed at Your Door. Not in a Cage.' = 9 words
No generic phrases found; headline uses contrast and specificity

expectations.text: Stats/social proof section with at least 3 numbers present
Service grid with at least 4 cards each having icon, title, description
expectations.evidence: 6 service cards with emoji icon, h3 title, and p description each

expectations.text: Final CTA section with form input and button
expectations.evidence: cta-section with zip code input and 'Book My Dog's Groom' button

expectations.text: Navigation bar is fixed/sticky with backdrop blur

expectations.evidence: @keyframes float, sparkle, rise all defined and applied to hero elements
